compiled_state.title: Generalize list filters + deprecate list-epics to a thin wrapper (orthogonal to strangler-fig)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
list-epics duplicates query/reduction logic that belongs in the generic list primitive. Generalize the generic filters so 'get epics' is one generic call, then reduce list-epics to a thin deprecating wrapper. Orthogonal to the bash->Python strangler-fig (adult-oxide-slave) — tracked on its own.

## What
1. Expand the generic 'list' read primitive (rebar._engine_support.reads.list_states + ticket_reads CLI + library list_tickets + MCP list tool):
   - --min-children=N : tickets with >= N non-deleted direct children.
   - --unblocked / --blocked : filter by blocking state (reuse rebar.graph find_ready_tickets / all_blockers_closed).
   - include a children_count field in list output (cheap, additive, universal) so one call returns enriched epics.
2. list-epics becomes a thin wrapper: (a) display deprecation warning (stderr), (b) ONE call to get epics (generic list --type=epic --status=open,in_progress [--unblocked] [--min-children]), (c) ONE call to get P0 bugs (generic list --type=bug --priority=0, counted), (d) assemble the {p0_bugs, epics} output. Replaces the bespoke ticket-list-epics.sh reduction.
3. Surfaces: CLI dispatcher arm, library list_epics(), MCP list_epics tool — all wrap + warn.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] generic list gains --min-children + --unblocked/--blocked + children_count, at CLI + library + MCP
- [ ] new filters/field covered by tests; list output schema updated for children_count
- [ ] list-epics is a wrapper: warns + 1 call epics + 1 call P0 bugs -> {p0_bugs, epics}; no bespoke reduction
- [ ] deprecation warning at CLI (stderr, not stdout/JSON) + library (DeprecationWarning) + MCP description
- [ ] list-epics output parity preserved ({p0_bugs, epics}); existing schema/MCP tests green or updated
- [ ] docs note the deprecation + new generic filters

comments.body:
DONE (committed 8fdd6ba3, b325da5f): generic 'list' now exposes the criteria list-epics filtered by — children_count field + --min-children + --unblocked/--blocked — wired at reads/CLI/library/MCP. 14 exhaustive tests (tests/interfaces/test_list_filters.py, 187 LOC): children_count presence/values/leaf/deleted-excluded; min-children boundary 3/1/0/99 + non-int validation; blocked=active-with-open-blocker, unblocked excludes blocked, transition-on-close; CLI<->library parity. test-ticket-list (30) + both list-epics suites + schema tier still green.

REMAINING — list-epics -> thin wrapper (warn + 1 epics call + 1 p0 call -> {p0_bugs,epics}). Coupled migration surface (do in lockstep): (1) library list_epics -> wrapper composing list_tickets(epic,status=open,in_progress,blocking_state=unblocked|'',min_children) + list_tickets(bug,priority=0); (2) list_epics.schema.json p0_bugs/epics items -> ticket_state arrays (drop the bespoke id/blocking/blocked/blockers projection — blocking-awareness now via the --blocked/--unblocked filter); (3) ListEpicsOut pydantic model -> {p0_bugs:[TicketStateOut], epics:[TicketStateOut]}; (4) interface test_list_epics_shape_and_exit_codes (no more exit 1/2); (5) dispatcher list-epics arm -> warn(stderr)+emit wrapper JSON; (6) retire ticket-list-epics.sh + ticket_list_epics fn + the bespoke suites (test-ticket-list-epics-{dispatcher,alias}.sh, test-ticket-deleted-not-counted-as-child.sh — coverage subsumed by test_list_filters.py + generic list).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: COMPLETE (8fdd6ba3, b325da5f, 79de92d5, ad30433f — pushed to main). Generic list exposes the criteria list-epics filtered by: --min-children, --unblocked/--blocked, and an OPT-IN children_count (with_children_count / --with-children-count) — kept opt-in to preserve the show==list==search single-reducer invariant (f026). list-epics is now a thin wrapper: deprecation warning + one generic epics call + one generic P0-bugs call -> {p0_bugs, epics}, no bespoke reduction; the bash ticket-list-epics.sh is dead (Tier-E cleanup). Deprecation surfaced at CLI (stderr), library (DeprecationWarning), MCP (docstring); removed from 'rebar help' overview + CLAUDE.md + per-subcommand help marked DEPRECATED so agents don't reach for it. Tests: 14 exhaustive filter tests + invariant restored + schema/MCP/list-epics bash suites; full interface tier 245 green. Closing.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
